response.global_analysis: 1. Talk Segment Translation: Transcribed Indonesian dialogue accurately and translated to English, maintaining VTuber tone and banter. 2. Song Translation & Synchronization: Synced 'Chromatic Future' lyrics with precise vocal timing, separating English lines and translating Indonesian lines into English seamlessly. 3. Timing and Pacing: Ensured start times perfectly match the exact onset of speech and song lyrics, using aggressive end-time truncation to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Untung lagunya santai, easy listening, jadi kita sambil keliling-keliling kan ya sapa fans kita, ya?
subtitles.english: Thankfully, the song is relaxed and easy listening, so we can walk around and greet our fans, right?

subtitles.original: Asyik banget ya tadi ya? Aku juga suka banget tadi dance bagian reff-nya ya.
subtitles.english: It was really fun, wasn't it? I also really liked the dance in the chorus.

subtitles.original: La-da-la-da-la-da...
subtitles.english: La-da-la-da-la-da...

subtitles.original: Itu... itu beda lagu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Isn't... isn't that a different song?

subtitles.original: Gak gitu deh. Kayak gitu kah?
subtitles.english: I don't think it's like that. Is it like that?

subtitles.original: Ya, tapi pokoknya asyik lah ya kalau nyanyi lagu chill, santai-santai kayak gini.
subtitles.english: Yeah, but anyway, it's fun to sing a chill, relaxed song like this.

subtitles.original: Iya, santai dong.
subtitles.english: Yeah, relaxed.

subtitles.original: Tapi ngomongin soal santai, kita tuh sebenarnya belum bisa santai dulu. Heh, santai.
subtitles.english: But speaking of relaxing, we actually can't relax just yet. Hey, relax.

subtitles.original: Katanya gak boleh santai...
subtitles.english: You said we can't relax...

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, jangan santai-santai! Jangan terlalu santai.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, don't relax! Don't be too relaxed.

subtitles.original: Karena konser-nya tuh masih panjang!
subtitles.english: Because the concert is still long!

subtitles.original: Jadi sebelum itu, kalian ada nggak yang mau kalian sampaikan dulu?
subtitles.english: So before that, is there anything you'd like to say first?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari ini nih, yang gak bisa diam.
subtitles.english: Starting with this one, who can't keep still.

subtitles.original: Tiga kata saja...
subtitles.english: Just three words...

subtitles.original: I love you.
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: Keren, the best. Sangat jelas, ya.
subtitles.english: Cool, the best. Very clear, yeah.

subtitles.original: Tetap semangat. Tetap semangat menjalani hidup, ya. Dah gitu aja. Pokoknya sampai akhir masih panjang, semangat!
subtitles.english: Keep fighting. Keep fighting to live your life. That's all. Anyway, it's still a long way to the end, fight on!

subtitles.original: Saranghaeyo! Gomawoyo!
subtitles.english: I love you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Oke, kalau aku...
subtitles.english: Okay, as for me...

subtitles.original: Ya... Semangat selalu! Semangat santai! Hidup jangan terlalu dibawa serius.
subtitles.english: Yeah... Always fight! Relaxed spirit! Don't take life too seriously.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai ya? Semangat santai.
subtitles.english: Relaxed spirit, huh? Relaxed spirit.

subtitles.original: Oke, kalau gitu kita lanjutkan!
subtitles.english: Okay, in that case, let's continue!

subtitles.original: Weits, weits, tunggu dulu. Sebelum selesai-selesai ini nih ya...
subtitles.english: Whoa, whoa, wait a minute. Before we finish all of this...

subtitles.original: Kita teriak bareng-bareng penonton dulu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Why don't we scream together with the audience first?

subtitles.original: Iya dong! Ayo! Ayo!
subtitles.english: Of course! Let's do it! Let's go!

subtitles.original: Oke, oke. Jadi...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. So...

subtitles.original: Kita teriak bareng ya? Dalam hitungan ketiga, kita sama-sama teriak 'Chromatic Future'. Oke, ya?
subtitles.english: We'll scream together, okay? On the count of three, let's all scream 'Chromatic Future'. Okay?

subtitles.original: Oke, oke. 'Chromatic Future' gitu kan ya?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. 'Chromatic Future', right?

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, kayak gitu, kayak gitu.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, like that, like that.

subtitles.original: Oke, langsung ya? Sambil lihat sini, sini, sini, sambil lihat. Ayo!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's do it! While looking here, here, here, look here. Come on!

subtitles.original: Aku ya, aku, aku. Aku yang penonton ini nih, penonton sini.
subtitles.english: Me! Me! I'll look at this audience, the audience here.

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, iya. Aku, aku, aku ini deh, yang tengah, yang tengah. Halo!
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah. I'll look at the middle, the middle ones. Hello!

subtitles.original: Oke, bareng-bareng ya. Satu, dua, tiga!
subtitles.english: Okay, together. One, two, three!

subtitles.original: Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Chromatic Future!
